narrative: You commit to: "Nobody's looking. I help myself to a few twenties from the till — just to cover this month's rent.".
ack_line: You commit to: "Nobody's looking. I help myself to a few twenties from the till — just to cover this month's rent.".

vars.name: Adventurer
vars.player_role: part-time barista balancing rent, friendships, and future plans
vars.character_profile: part-time barista balancing rent, friendships, and future plans

locations.name: the_grind_stone
locations.description: Steam hisses from the copper espresso machine while the scent of burnt milk and citrus cleaner clings to your apron.

locations.name: unit_4b
locations.description: Dust motes dance over a pile of unpaid electric bills on the scarred plywood coffee table.

locations.name: the_blue_line_platform
locations.description: Cold wind whistles through the concrete pillars as the flickering arrival sign announces another twenty-minute delay.

locations.name: mrs_guptas_grocery
locations.description: Narrow aisles overflow with sacks of jasmine rice and the sharp, comforting aroma of toasted cumin.

npcs.name: Elias Thorne
npcs.motivation: To keep the cafe's overhead low enough to earn a manager's bonus he desperately needs for his daughter's tuition.

npcs.name: Sloane Miller
npcs.motivation: To land a touring gig and finally stop venmoing you rent three weeks late every month.

npcs.name: Mrs. Gupta
npcs.motivation: To maintain the community's fading history against the rising tide of luxury condo developments.

_world_bible.central_tension: Will you sacrifice your creative spark and personal connections to achieve financial stability, or will you risk burnout to keep your dreams alive?
_world_bible.entry_point: You scrub a stubborn ring of dried espresso off the counter while Elias taps his watch, pointing toward the line of impatient commuters stretching out the door.
